title: Sportfreunde Stiller - Mit dem Herz in der Hand
original_title: Sportfreunde Stiller - Mit dem Herz in der Hand
overview: Through their songs, Sportfreunde Stiller have helped shape the outlook on life of an entire generation. Now, to mark their 30th anniversary, they are back in the spotlight. With exclusive access, the film follows the indie rock band as they create their new album. An intense musical portrait unfolds, capturing moments both on and off stage, as well as in their private lives.
